_notes: Source: hemas-patient (hospital enterprise, highly constrained). Target: R4 base patient (unconstrained). All drifts are relaxations: hemas mandatory elements become optional, identifier slicing removed, named extensions removed, contact sub-constraints removed. R4 base adds no new constraints but exposes elements not constrained in hemas.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [hemas-pat-1 (error: Patient must have at least one identifier with a system), hemas-pat-2 (warning: Patient should have an emergency contact)]. R4 base has no custom constraints (only pat-1 on contact backbone).
Optional extension registrationDate[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (R4 base has no extension constraints).
Optional extension vipStatus[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension insuranceProvider[0..* mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Source extension slicing removed in target: source defines slices [registrationDate, vipStatus, insuranceProvider]; R4 base has no extension slicing.
Identifier slicing removed in target: source has named slices [hospitalId[1..1 mustSupport=true], nic[0..1 mustSupport=true]]; R4 base has no identifier slicing.
Source mandatory identifier slice hospitalId[1..1 mustSupport=true] with type[1..* patternCC(MR)], system[1..1], value[1..1] constraints removed in target.
Source optional identifier slice nic[0..1 mustSupport=true] with type[1..* patternCC(NI)], system[1..1], value[1..1] constraints removed in target.
identifier cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased.
active cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min decreased.
name cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased.
name.family MustSupport removed on required element: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.
name.given MustSupport removed on required element: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.
telecom cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed from required element: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and MS removed.

telecom.system cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true required:contact-point-system] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base no telecom.system constraint in differential). Min decreased and MS removed.
telecom.value cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.

gender cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true required:administrative-gender] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min decreased. Same required binding on administrative-gender (with version pin |4.0.1 added in R4 base).
birthDate cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min decreased.
address cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed from required element: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and MS removed.
address.line MustSupport removed on required element: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.
address.city MustSupport removed on required element: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.
address.district MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base does not constrain address.district. MS removed from optional element.
address.country MustSupport removed on required element: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.

maritalStatus MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true extensible:marital-status; R4 base has same extensible:marital-status binding, mustSupport=false. MS removed from optional element. Same binding preserved.

Source contact sub-element constraints removed: source has contact[mustSupport=true] with relationship[1..* mustSupport=true extensible:patient-contactrelationship], name[1..1 mustSupport=true], telecom[1..* mustSupport=true]. R4 base has all contact sub-elements as optional with mustSupport=false.
communication MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. Optional element.

communication.language MustSupport removed on required element: source mustSupport=true extensible:languages; R4 base [1..1 mustSupport=false preferred:languages]. Same element, min=1 in both. MS removed and binding strength weakened from extensible to preferred.

communication.language binding strength weakened: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages). Same value set, strength weakened.
generalPractitioner reference target widened: source constrains to hemas/Practitioner (single profile); R4 base target is [Organization, Practitioner, PractitionerRole]. Target widened.
generalPractitioner MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. Optional element.

managingOrganization cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed from required element: source [1..1 mustSupport=true →hemas/Organization] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and MS removed.
managingOrganization reference target removed: source constrains to hemas/Organization; R4 base has no target profile constraint (generic Reference(Organization)).
